content: I sized it with search_count first, then aggregated with read_group and paginated with explicit fields instead of reading all fields for all rows. No records were created or deleted.

arguments.code:
pb = call('odoo', {'operation':'playbook','name':'performance-timeout'})
n = call('odoo', {'model':'stock.move','method':'search_count','args':[[]]})
g = call('odoo', {'model':'stock.move','method':'read_group','args':[[], ['product_id'], ['product_id']]})
